_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: 0.1 nM NRG-1β producing maximal migration of YST-1 cells
details: NRG-1β at 0.1 nM produced maximal migration enhancement, with statistically significant increases observed
